channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fry tipping, duvet left uncovered full of urine outside property ACTION REQUIRED IMMEDIATELY, 5th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped outside property with a duvet smelly soaked with urine, action required immediately. Every week someone leave and dump rubbish outside the same place.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inconsiderate resident littering, 5th April
item.description:
Reported via mobile in the Flytipping - General category anonymously at 23:57, Friday 3 April 2026 using FixMyStreet Pro Sent to Southwark FixMyStreet ref: 9237375. You noted the incident as resolved and closed the case, while the items are still outside 184 Upland Road Not the first time that the residents of this property leave unwanted things on the pavement. This is probably some kind of furniture that not only litters, but is a hazard for pedestrians and especially children. Please remove the soonest possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 182, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike shed Willesden lane, 5th April
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole between the speed bumps on plough way, first set after Tesco express going westward, 5th April
item.description:
This pothole has developed other the past few weeks and now is potentially hazardous to vehicles driving over it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plough Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 3 tags on wall., 5th April
item.description:
Graffiti on wall on salter road overlooking Surrey water. 3 tags, appeared overnight. Today is the first time I’ve noticed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thames Link, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins full & overflowing, 5th April
item.description:
Yet again, the street litter bins outside 4 & 6 Kelsey Park Road are full and overflowing onto pavement. The council really does have to do something about increasing the emptying schedule.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Kelsey Park Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gallon close se78sy, 5th April
item.description:
The weeds on the pavements of gallon close se78sy plus behind houses 48/49/50 is very bad too.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gallon Close, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Along the side of p J Supplies fronting Cray Avenue, 5th April
item.description:
General rubbish along the grass verge of P J Suplies fronting Cray Avenue which needs clearing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 5th April
item.description:
Household fly tip on the pavement outside flats 24 to 29 gallon close se78sy.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gallon Close, Charlton

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, London

item.title: Broken glasd, 5th April
item.description:
Marvels Lane junction of Chinbrook Road Bus shelter has had glass panel smashed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marvels Lane, Chinbrook, Greater London

item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Flytipping - broken furniture, chairs, car seat and other rubbish, 5th April
item.description:
Broken furniture, chairs, car seat and other rubbish. Please could this be removed. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Vista, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter not cleared by council, 5th April
item.description:
Litter along Nelson Mandela Road building up. The council are not clearing the road as per agreed schedule. Another failure by Greenwich council to maintain even a basic service for residents
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nelson Mandela Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rd Debris, 5th April
item.description:
This section of pavement is very messy Needs a good clean Lots of branches and general rubbish. Looks very untidy
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 5th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Street, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Large amount of big trash thrown over fence into garden, 5th April
item.description:
Big items such as a mattress, a mini fridge, a office chair and suitcases along with lots of rubbish thrown over fence into back garden at 89 Beaconsfield Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beaconsfield Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet
